requirements.summary: Rebuild and redeploy the existing KopdeGoa application preserving all frontend components (Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, Footer, QrCodeSection) without modifications
acceptanceCriteria: The app builds successfully without errors
All existing sections (Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, Footer) render correctly
The Products section displays all liquor/wine category cards with their updated emojis
The app is deployed and accessible

file_operations.description: Verify all existing components (Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, Footer) are properly imported and rendered in the correct order to ensure the app layout is preserved during rebuild
Verify the fixed navigation header with logo, brand name, desktop split nav links, and mobile hamburger menu renders correctly without any modifications

Verify the full-screen hero section with background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x600.jpg), brand name, tagline, and CTA buttons with smooth-scroll functionality is preserved
Verify the About section displays KopdeGoa's brand story paragraphs and the four-value card grid (Quality, Authenticity, Trust, Community) with Lucide icons without changes

Verify the Products section displays all liquor/wine category cards (Whisky, Wine, Vodka, Rum, Beer, Flavored Drinks, Heritage Spirits) with their updated emojis, descriptions, and hover animations exactly as currently implemented
Verify the Contact section with phone, location, hours cards, social media links, and the validated request-changes form with mailto functionality renders correctly

Verify the Footer displays the KopdeGoa logo (frontend/public/assets/generated/kopde-goa-logo-transparent.dim_200x200.png or similar), brand name, contact info, Request Changes scroll link, dynamic copyright year, and caffeine.ai attribution without modifications
Verify the QrCodeSection component file is preserved in its current empty state as required by the rebuild
Verify global CSS with Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and accent-red utility classes are preserved exactly as is
Verify Tailwind configuration with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radii, accordion keyframes, and plugins (typography, container queries, animations) is preserved without changes
Verify the HTML shell for KopdeGoa React app with root div mount point and main TypeScript module loader is preserved
Verify the application entry point mounting React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider is preserved exactly as is
